clips.title: The Scent
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. An opulent marble vanity, a glowing crystal perfume bottle, gold accents, silk drapery. Evening, elegant. A person in refined evening attire reaches gracefully toward the perfume bottle, poised. Reflections, a soft flower, glinting gold. Soft key with luminous rim, glossy grade. Slow dolly in. Aspirational luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Watch
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A dark reflective surface, dramatic product lighting, subtle haze. Studio. A person in a tailored suit cuff adjusts a gleaming luxury wristwatch, elegant hand pose. Polished metal, a glinting dial, soft reflections. Dramatic product key with crisp highlights, glossy grade. 85mm, slow dolly in. Refined luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Showroom
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A pristine marble showroom, a gleaming luxury car under soft key lights, floor reflections. Studio, elegant. A person in a sharp designer outfit stands beside the car, hand resting on it, poised. Rim-lit curves, a light bank reflection, haze. Soft key with elegant rim, glossy grade. Slow orbit. Opulent luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Penthouse
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A lavish penthouse at golden hour, floor-to-ceiling windows, a glittering city skyline, marble floors. Evening, warm. A person in elegant attire stands at the window with a glass, gazing over the city, poised. Designer furniture, soft drapes, city glow. Warm golden light, glossy grade. Crane rise. Aspirational luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Toast
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Evening, celebratory. An opulent gala setting, chandeliers, gold accents, bokeh lights. A person in glamorous evening wear raises a champagne flute in a graceful toast, radiant. Sparkling bubbles, a floral centerpiece, soft glints. Warm chandelier glow with sparkle, glossy grade. Slow dolly in. Glamorous luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Runway
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A sleek fashion runway, glossy black floor, dramatic spotlights, a silhouetted audience. Evening, high-fashion. A person in a striking designer outfit strides confidently down the runway, poised and powerful. Spotlight pools, flashing bulbs, haze. Dramatic runway spotlight, glossy grade. Side tracking. High-fashion luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Vitrine
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. An elegant jewelry boutique, a glowing glass vitrine of glittering jewels, velvet, gold trim. Evening, refined. A person in an evening gown admires a necklace at the display case, graceful, hand raised. Sparkling gems, soft reflections, spotlights. Jewel-lit key with sparkle, glossy grade. Slow dolly in. Exquisite luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Yacht
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A sleek luxury yacht deck on a sparkling blue sea, teak wood, chrome rails, a distant coastline. Day, sunny. A person in resort chic stands at the rail as the yacht cuts through the water, hair in the breeze, poised. Spray, sun glints, a lounge chair. Bright glamorous daylight, glossy grade. Crane rise. Aspirational luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Spa
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A serene luxury spa, a glowing infinity pool, candles, orchids, soft steam. Evening, tranquil. A person in a plush robe reclines gracefully by the pool, eyes closed, serene. Floating petals, warm candlelight, soft steam. Soft warm ambient glow, glossy grade. Slow dolly in. Serene luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Fitting
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Present day. A refined bespoke tailoring atelier, rolls of fine fabric, a three-way mirror, warm wood. Day, elegant. A person in a half-tailored suit stands before the mirror adjusting a lapel, poised, appraising. A tape measure, fabric swatches, a mannequin. Warm refined light, glossy grade. Slow orbit. Sophisticated luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Skybar
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Evening, chic. An upscale rooftop lounge at dusk, a glowing bar, city lights bokeh, sleek seating. A person in stylish evening wear leans elegantly at the bar with a cocktail, poised. A crystal glass, warm bar glow, city bokeh. Warm dusk with neon accents, glossy grade. Slow dolly in. Chic luxury aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Staircase
clips.prompt: Glossy high-end commercial style, premium product-ad look, polished, aspirational, rich materials, dramatic elegant lighting. Evening, grand. A grand marble staircase in an opulent hall, a crystal chandelier, gold railings, red carpet. A person in flowing evening wear descends the staircase gracefully, one hand on the rail, radiant. Chandelier sparkle, marble reflections, drapery. Warm grand lighting, glossy grade. Crane rise. Majestic luxury aesthetic, 24fps.
